name: snyk-artifactory-azure-upload
description: Set's properties on artifactory artifacts with result of snyk SAST scan
author: Snyk

inputs.name: Stage
inputs.label: Stage
inputs.helpMarkDown: Stage determines the function of the extension, stage 1 (Takes Snyk JSON scan information and uploads it to build directory) should come before stage 2 (Updates selected Artifact with Snyk scan details) in the pipeline

inputs.name: InputType
inputs.label: InputType
inputs.helpMarkDown: Select how you'd like the extension to determine which Artifacts to set properties on - UrlLIst allows you to Allows you to enter a list of Artifact URL's, and Build will have you enter build details and pull Artifacts from there

inputs.name: artifactUrls
inputs.label: artifactUrls
inputs.helpMarkDown: A list of artifact url's (excluding base URL) to set properties on. i.e (someartifacts/location,anotherartifacts/location)

inputs.name: delimiter
inputs.label: A char to split the artifact urls with
inputs.helpMarkDown: A char to split the artifact urls with

inputs.name: BuildName
inputs.label: BuildName
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of build from which to pull Artifacts

inputs.name: BuildNumber
inputs.label: BuildNumber
inputs.helpMarkDown: The build number to search by, can be LATEST for the latest build number

inputs.name: BuildStatus
inputs.label: BuildStatus
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optionally search for the latest build status (e.g: Released)
